title: sparefixd NTC Thermistor Drying Probe for Hoover Washing Machine 41032956
features: Washing Machine NTC Thermistor Drying Probe

See description below for full list of models this part fits. The model number is normally found inside the door, below or above the door seal. Quite often the model number plate can also be found on the side or at the rear of the machine. The model number will usually be printed or stamped on to a sticker or plate and will consist of numbers and letters.
